introSection: Familien-Achterbahn is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Tolk-Schau in Tolk, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a dragon.

fullText:
Familien-Achterbahn is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Tolk-Schau in Tolk, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany.



Orange track and yellow supports.

The train is designed to resemble a dragon.
